changeSet.author: gilmanovamir
changeSet.sql: insert into bank_partner(name, partner_category, account_id) values ('Аптека', 'MEDICINE', (select a.id from account a where a.account_number = '810123456'))
insert into bank_partner(name, partner_category, account_id) values ('Супермаркет', 'FOOD', (select a.id from account a where a.account_number = '810123457'))
insert into bank_partner(name, partner_category, account_id) values ('Кинотеатр', 'ENTERTAINMENT', (select a.id from account a where a.account_number = '810123458'))
